dosingInfo.rawDosageText: Directions Read insert (inside package) on how to: • get a new bottle ready (primed) before first use • prime bottle again if not used for more than 2 weeks • use the spray • clean the spray nozzle ADULTS AND CHILDREN 12 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER adults and children 12 years of age and older • once daily, spray 2 times into each nostril while sniffing gently • once your allergy symptoms improve, reduce to 1 spray in each nostril per day CHILDREN 2 TO UNDER 12 YEARS OF AGE • the growth rate of some
